4: Meet me at the Gleamsands! I'll be along just as soon as I find someone to stand in for me.

5: I hope we can all continue to rely on your support. We'll draw upon every last connection we have to make this event a reality!

6: By all means, go and make your rounds! The others will surely be delighted to tell you of their progress thus far.

7: It's another busy day here in Wachumeqimeqi, but we're always thankful for your custom.

8: Be they neighbors or tourists, people of all cultures are brought together by commerce. You, too, are a precious bead in our necklace, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>─never forget that.
